case_title: THE STEWART COMPANY VS. EDW BIS et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BIS, EDW AKA EDWINA BISSON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BIS, EDW DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE BIS, EDW AKA EDWINA BISSON
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTEMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $50.00 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT BIS, EDW AKA EDWINA BISSON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIS, EDW AKA EDWINA BISSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1404 C STURGEON ST. S.F. CA., - INCLUDING ALL ATTENDANT GARAGE, STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS; DEFENDANT HAS AGREED TO WAIVER HER/HIS RIGHT TO SEEK OR RECEIVE A STAY OF EVICTION, SEE SCANNED DOC.
